title: Silky Spicy Stir Fry
description: A flavorful Indian stir fry recipe that combines silky tofu with spicy Spanish sausage. This dish is easy to make and packed with protein.

ingredients.name: Stir Fry Vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bell peppers and onions

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Spanish sausage and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the tofu, cooking until lightly browned on all sides.
Add the tomato, spicy sauce, stir fry vegetables, ginger, and garlic. Stir to combine.
Cook until the vegetables are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
